boundary: Machine-checkable index of current P011 exit evidence; not a declaration that P011 is complete.

categories.name: Replay Evidence

proofs.why: Indexes supported replay-family proofs and their explicit open boundaries.
Documents current snapshot-restore parity coverage and remaining replay gaps.

categories.open_boundary: Still not a full replay-from-origin proof for every replay-relevant action family.

categories.name: Recovery Evidence

proofs.why: Validates a generated file-backed interrupted-session observer drill.
Validates a generated file-backed missing-target recovery observer drill.
Documents read-only recovery diagnostics, manual dry-runs, and non-selection boundaries.

categories.open_boundary: Automatic startup recovery selection and real interrupted-host-session rehearsal remain open.

categories.name: Export Reproducibility Evidence

proofs.why: Documents the normalized product-export proof boundary for the current Feral grid full-mix seam.
Validates stable normalized manifest data plus audio artifact hashes for repeated exports.

categories.open_boundary: Full arrangement export, stem package export, live recording export, and DAW-style export remain open.

categories.name: Stage-Style Stability Evidence

proofs.why: Documents the normalized repeated-run stage-style restore-diversity proof boundary.
Validates repeated-run observer/audio evidence, boundary coverage, and stable full-mix hash.

categories.open_boundary: Host-audio soak, multi-hour live-session endurance, and device-driver stability remain open.

known_open_boundaries: full replay-from-origin for every replay-relevant action family
full arrangement export and stem package export
host-audio soak and multi-hour live-session endurance
